video_info.title: UEFA Europa League 2025-26
video_info.shortDescription: Aston Villa return to Villa Park protecting a 1–0 aggregate advantage, while Lille face the challenge of overturning the deficit against a side buoyed by formidable European home form. Can the visitors defy the odds and script an upset? Find out as we bring you all the action from the UEFA Europa League 2025-26, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.

video_info.title: UEFA Europa League 2025-26
video_info.shortDescription: Roma, battling injuries and inconsistent form while Bologna arrive in strong and steady momentum with the tie finely balanced at 1–1 on aggregate after a closely fought first leg. Who will come out on top in this decisive clash? Find out as we bring you all the action from the UEFA Europa League 2025-26, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.

video_info.title: Sitaare Zameen Par
video_info.shortDescription: After a DUI, an arrogant basketball coach must train neurodivergent adults for community service. His initial prejudice fades as his players show him a new perspective on life.
